site.title: MY PICKS
site.bio: Products I personally tested and recommend ✦

products.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Cancelling Headphones
products.description: The best noise cancelling I've ever tried — total silence on flights

products.title: Dyson V15 Detect Cordless Vacuum
products.description: Laser reveals dust you didn't know existed — genuinely life-changing

products.title: Anker 733 GaNPrime 67W Charger
products.description: Charges laptop and phone at once — tiny enough to forget it's in your bag

products.title: COSRX Snail Mucin 96% Essence
products.description: K-beauty cult product — my skin looked different within a week

products.title: Vitamix E310 Explorian Blender
products.description: 10-year warranty and it shows — smoothest smoothies I've ever made

products.title: Kindle Paperwhite 16GB
products.description: Waterproof, 6-week battery — I haven't touched my phone at night since
